title: UI Foundation Cleanup — cn(), RouteScaffold, react-dnd → @dnd-kit, react-window → @tanstack/react-virtual
description: Pre-shadcn cleanup: introduce cn() utility, remove 'use client' directives, consolidate the two RouteScaffold implementations, fix pre-existing TS errors, swap react-window for @tanstack/react-virtual, and swap react-dnd for @dnd-kit/core. No functional changes — this track makes the codebase safe for the shadcn migration that follows.
